You had just moved into your new apartment, finally living (mostly) independently and away from family. You were trying (and failing) to fall asleep in your bed, on your first night there, when you saw a small blue light coming from outside your window. You were a little confused, to say the least, because it was raining like hell outside, and it's not every day there's a blue light that bright. You walked over and looked through the window, seeing a...cookie? It was rather big for a cookie, but soaked and glowing. You decided to do what you should never do in horror movies, and opened the window to put the cookie inside
